name: @salary-hijacking/admin
description: Salary Hijacking administrator console for server-authoritative payroll, budget, expense, savings, notifications, growth, community, ads, partners and operations management.
author: Salary Hijacking Platform

scripts.preview:next: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run start
scripts.preview:cloudflare: corepack pnpm run build:cloudflare && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run clean:next && corepack pnpm run validate:package && corepack pnpm run typecheck:strict && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run test:qa && corepack pnpm run build:next && corepack pnpm run build:verify
scripts.build:cloudflare: node ../../scripts/release/check-opennext-windows-symlink.mjs && corepack pnpm run clean:cloudflare && opennextjs-cloudflare build && corepack pnpm run build:cloudflare:verify
scripts.build:cloudflare:verify: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const required=['.open-next/worker.js','.open-next/assets']; const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length) throw new Error('missing OpenNext output: '+missing.join(', ')); console.log('admin OpenNext build verified')"
scripts.build:verify: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const f of ['.next']) if (!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error('missing '+f); console.log('admin build verified')"
scripts.test:qa: corepack pnpm run test:unit && corepack pnpm run test:integration && corepack pnpm run test:accessibility && corepack pnpm run privacy:check && corepack pnpm run policy:check
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck:strict && corepack pnpm run test:qa
scripts.ci: corepack pnpm run clean && corepack pnpm run quality && corepack pnpm run build
scripts.validate:package: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(pkg.private!==true) throw new Error('admin package must be private'); if(pkg.type!=='module') throw new Error('admin package must be ESM'); console.log('admin package contract ok')"
scripts.validate:env: node -e "for (const k of Object.keys(process.env)) if(k.startsWith('NEXT_PUBLIC_') && /(SECRET|TOKEN|PASSWORD|PRIVATE|DATABASE|JWT|KEY|COOKIE|SESSION|FCM|SERVICE_ACCOUNT|NEON|WEBHOOK)/i.test(k)) throw new Error('unsafe public env '+k); console.log('admin env public allowlist ok')"
scripts.api:contract: node -e "console.log('admin api contract delegated to @salary-hijacking/api-contract and E2E smoke tests')"
scripts.docs:lint: node -e "console.log('admin feature README contracts are source-of-truth checked by repository review')"
scripts.privacy:check: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); const text=JSON.stringify(pkg); for (const marker of ['rawFinancialDataForAds','rawPushTokenLogging','adminReasonRequired','redactedExportOnly']) if(!text.includes(marker)) throw new Error('privacy marker missing '+marker); console.log('admin privacy contract ok')"
scripts.policy:check: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); const m=pkg.metadata||{}; if(m.rawFinancialDataForAds!==false || m.rawPushTokenLogging!==false || m.adminReasonRequired!==true || m.adsFinancialTargetingAllowed!==false) throw new Error('admin policy guard failed'); console.log('admin policy guard ok')"
scripts.deploy: corepack pnpm run build:cloudflare && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.deploy:staging: corepack pnpm run build:cloudflare && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: corepack pnpm run build:cloudflare && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.doctor: node --version && corepack pnpm --version && corepack pnpm run validate:package && corepack pnpm run validate:env && corepack pnpm run typecheck:strict && corepack pnpm run policy:check
